name: io.github.payclaw/spend
description: Agents are not bots. PayClaw proves it — then lets them pay. UCP Credential Provider: Badge + Spend on Visa rails. No API key required — device auth flow built in.

environmentVariables.name: PAYCLAW_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Your PayClaw API key for existing accounts. If omitted, device authorization flow triggers automatically on first use.

environmentVariables.name: PAYCLAW_EXTENDED_AUTH
environmentVariables.description: Set to "true" or "1" to enable. Asks your agent to confirm merchant accepted or denied. Logged to dashboard so you can see visibility of your token by merchant. Default: false (agent reports via payclaw_reportBadgeOutcome).
